caption: A man with long hair tied back, wearing glasses, a white long-sleeved shirt, and a dark embroidered vest with red details, stands before a microphone on a stand. He appears to be singing or speaking while playing an acoustic guitar, though only the upper body of the instrument is visible. He is positioned in front of tan horizontal blinds. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, suggesting an audience. To the right of the man, the white text "ORCA" is displayed on the screen. As the scene progresses, the man's head movements are subtle; he looks down toward his guitar and then slightly upward and forward. The overall setting and the positions of the people and equipment remain constant throughout the sequence.
